title: Raaka Chocolate Announces All-New Bananas Foster Bar
snippet: Raaka is celebrating summer with a new unroasted dark chocolate bar flavored with caramelized bananas, brown sugar, and rum.
reason: Directly mentions craft chocolate bar release.

title: Ecuadorian Cacao Co-ops Report Historic Nacional Harvest
snippet: Smallholder farmers in the Esmeraldas region report premium yields of highly-aromatic Nacional cocoa beans.
reason: Directly relates to single origin cocoa bean harvest.
